name: Anytime Cake WW
recipeIngredient: 1 package Chocolate or Double Fudge Alba 77
1 package Sugar Twin (not equal or Sweet 'n' Low)
1 dash Molly McButter or other butter flavoring
2 drops Rum, almond, or coconut extract
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well.
2. Place the batter in a 4-inch x 4-inch pan coated with non-stick spray.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes.
